summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of studyOS Academic Intelligence System. All core functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and CTA buttons
Hub page displays all 8 domain cards with market demand indicators
Domain detail page shows Overview, Skill Matrix, Tool Stack, Execution Strategy sections
Toolkit page shows resources with category filtering (Foundation, Core Stack, Advanced, Projects, Industry Exposure)
User registration flow - create new account successfully
User login flow - authenticate with credentials successfully
Profile page protected by authentication (redirects correctly)
All 35 backend API tests passing (100% success rate)
Dark tactical UI theme properly implemented
Search and sort functionality on Hub page
Progress tracking and personal plan functionality
